keyEvents.text: Goal! Croatia 1, Ghana 0. Petar Sucic (Croatia) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Mateo Kovacic.
Substitution, Ghana. Kojo Peprah Oppong replaces Jonas Adjetey.
Substitution, Ghana. Abdul Fatawu replaces Elisha Owusu.
Substitution, Croatia. Igor Matanovic replaces Ante Budimir.
Ivan Perisic (Croatia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Ghana. Brandon Thomas-Asante replaces Jordan Ayew.
Substitution, Ghana. Ernest Nuamah replaces Kamaldeen Sulemana.

Goal! Croatia 1, Ghana 1. Derrick Luckassen (Ghana) left footed shot from very close range to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Ernest Nuamah with a cross following a set piece situation.Goal awarded following VAR Review.
Substitution, Croatia. Mario Pasalic replaces Mateo Kovacic.
Goal! Croatia 2, Ghana 1. Nikola Vlasic (Croatia) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Luka Modric with a cross following a corner.
Substitution, Ghana. Caleb Yirenkyi replaces Kwasi Sibo.
Substitution, Croatia. Josko Gvardiol replaces Nikola Vlasic.
Substitution, Croatia. Marco Pasalic replaces Martin Baturina.
Kojo Peprah Oppong (Ghana) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Panama. José Fajardo replaces Tomás Rodríguez.
José Fajardo (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Jarell Quansah (England) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Panama 0, England 1. Jude Bellingham (England) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Bukayo Saka with a cross following a corner.
Substitution, England. Djed Spence replaces Jarell Quansah because of an injury.
Substitution, England. Noni Madueke replaces Bukayo Saka.
Goal! Panama 0, England 2. Harry Kane (England) header from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Jude Bellingham with a cross.
Substitution, England. Eberechi Eze replaces Jude Bellingham.
Substitution, Panama. Ismael Díaz replaces Yoel Bárcenas.
Substitution, Panama. Azarías Londoño replaces José Luis Rodríguez.
Andrés Andrade (Panama) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, England. Jordan Henderson replaces Elliot Anderson.
Substitution, England. Ollie Watkins replaces Harry Kane.
Substitution, Panama. Alberto Quintero replaces Carlos Harvey.
Substitution, Panama. Éric Davis replaces Jorge Gutiérrez.
Substitution, Portugal. Diogo Dalot replaces João Cancelo.
Substitution, Portugal. João Neves replaces Rúben Neves.
Substitution, Colombia. Richard Ríos replaces Jefferson Lerma.
Substitution, Colombia. Luis Suárez replaces Jhon Córdoba.
Substitution, Portugal. Rafael Leão replaces João Félix.
Substitution, Portugal. Samú Costa replaces Vitinha.
Substitution, Colombia. Kevin Castaño replaces Jhon Arias.
Substitution, Colombia. Juan Fernando Quintero replaces James Rodríguez.
Gustavo Puerta (Colombia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Colombia. Daniel Muñoz replaces Santiago Arias.
Substitution, Portugal. Matheus Nunes replaces Nuno Mendes.
Goal! Congo DR 0, Uzbekistan 1. Eldor Shomurodov (Uzbekistan) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Akmal Mozgovoy.
Noah Sadiki (Congo DR) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Abdukodir Khusanov (Uzbekistan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Nathanaël Mbuku (Congo DR) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Sherzod Nasrullaev (Uzbekistan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Congo DR. Fiston Mayele replaces Cédric Bakambu.
Substitution, Uzbekistan. Odiljon Khamrobekov replaces Otabek Shukurov.
Substitution, Uzbekistan. Aziz G'aniev replaces Dostonbek Khamdamov.
Samuel Moutoussamy (Congo DR) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Congo DR 1, Uzbekistan 1. Yoane Wissa (Congo DR) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Substitution, Congo DR. Meschack Elia replaces Nathanaël Mbuku.
Substitution, Congo DR. Théo Bongonda replaces Brian Cipenga.
Substitution, Congo DR. Ngal'ayel Mukau replaces Samuel Moutoussamy.
Substitution, Uzbekistan. Oston Urunov replaces Abbosbek Fayzullaev.
Goal! Congo DR 2, Uzbekistan 1. Fiston Mayele (Congo DR) right footed shot from very close range to the top left corner following a fast break.
Substitution, Uzbekistan. Jamshid Iskanderov replaces Akmal Mozgovoy.
Substitution, Uzbekistan. Igor Sergeev replaces Jakhongir Urozov.
Substitution, Congo DR. Joris Kayembe replaces Arthur Masuaku.
Goal! Congo DR 3, Uzbekistan 1. Yoane Wissa (Congo DR) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Meschack Elia.
